underlying_goal: Continue building an Android weather app by completing tasks 7-10 via subagent-driven development, and create a CLAUDE.md guidance file for future Claude Code instances
friction_detail: Claude hit usage limits twice during the session, interrupting both the task 7-10 workflow and the initial CLAUDE.md creation attempt.
brief_summary: User wanted to continue building weather app tasks 7-10 and generate a CLAUDE.md file; tasks 7-8 completed but rate limits interrupted progress, and CLAUDE.md was eventually created on the third attempt.
